description.from: Deals 361*(1+0.3*Skill Level)+277.6% of Attack Power damage to enemies within range and stuns them for 2sec.
description.to: Deals ??? M.DMG to enemies in range, stunning them for 5 sec.

description.from: Engraves [Mark of Death] on all enemies for 15 sec, dealing 9*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient)) + 6.9% ATK M.DMG every 1 sec and reducing M.DEF by 10%. If recast within 15 sec, the M.DEF reduction increases by 50% and stacks up to 5 times. The M.DEF reduction increase effect cannot be dispelled.
description.to: Engraves a Mark on all enemies for 30 sec and deals ??? M.DMG over time. Enemies engraved with Mark takes 25% more M.DMG. This effect increases by 20% upon every use. This effect can be stacked up to max 5 times and is irremovable.

description.from: Deals 106*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient)) + 81.4% ATK M.DMG every 1 sec to all enemies for 22 sec, and recovers HP equal to 50% of damage dealt. During the duration, reduces M.DMG taken by 11% for 4 allies with the lowest M.DEF, and deals additional 81.4% ATK M.DMG to enemies inflicted with [Mark of Death].
description.to: Deals M.DMG to all enemies every sec for 15 sec, heals own HP equal to 100% of DMG dealt, and inflicts Stun on the hit target for 1 sec with a 10% chance. For the duration of Skill, gains immunity to CC. Against Marked targets, deals increased ??? M.DMG.

description.from:
Increases M.DEF of the ally with the lowest M.DEF by 101*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient)). When taking fatal damage, enters [Coffin] state for 5 sec, restoring 197*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient)) + 153.7% ATK + 10% Max HP.

[Coffin]: Unaffected by ATK Spd changes, becomes immune to all damage, and deals M.DMG equal to 5% of Max HP to nearby enemies every 1 sec.
description.to: Increases M.DEF of all allies. Upon taking fatal DMG, enters a coffin for 5 sec and heals HP equal to proportional to ATK + 6% of Max HP. While inside the coffin, Jane is not affected by ATK Spd effects, ignores All DMG, and deals M.DMG equal to 5% of Max HP to nearby enemies every sec.

light.from: Recovers HP equal to 50% of damage dealt.
light.to: Target takes 25% increased M.DMG for 10 sec.

dark.from: Mana cost increases by 2000, but pulls the target toward you.
dark.to: In exchange for 1 additional Mana Cost, the skill has a 100% chance to draw the target in.

light.from: Debuff duration is reduced to 10 sec, but damage is increased by 500%.
light.to: Duration is reduced to 10 sec and DMG is boosted by 250%.

dark.from: All allies additionally take 10% less Physical DMG.
dark.to: Upon use, dispels negative effects of all allies.

dark.from: When the effect triggers, stuns all enemies for 1 sec.
dark.to: Upon activation, stun all enemies for 2 sec.

description.from: [Funeral Rites] reduces the target's CC Resist by 320 and Magic Block chance by {0} for 4 sec.
description.to: [Funeral Rites] For 10 sec, reduces the target's CC Resist by 250 and M.Block by {0}.

description.from: [Mark of Death] When a marked enemy dies, increases own ATK by 5% and Crit DMG by {0}% for 20 sec. Stacks up to 16 times.
description.to: [Mark of Death] Increases ATK by 5% and Crit DMG by {0}% for 20 sec when the marked enemy dies. This effect stacks up to 8 times.

description.from: [Day of Ruin] increases DMG by {0}% and reduces the target's M.DEF by 3% for 5 sec each time damage is dealt. This effect can stack up to 10 times.
description.to: [Day of Ruin] DMG is increased by {0}% and with every DMG dealt, target's M.DEF is reduced by 5% for 5 sec. This effect can stack a max 10 times.

description.from: [Rest in Peace] Sets cooldown to 45 sec, and after activation, reduces M.DMG taken by {0}% for 10 sec.
description.to: [Rest in Peace] Upon activation, dispels all negative effects from all allies and reduces All DMG dealt on self by {0}% for 10 sec.

dark.from: On hit, Attack and Healing increase by 1%. This effect stacks up to 35 times.
dark.to: Each hit of Jane's attacks increase her ATK and Recovery Rate by 1% each. (Maximum stack number is 50)

description.from: Deals M.DMG equal to {0}% of ATK every sec to nearby enemies, reduces their ATK by {1}%, and recovers HP equal to 100% of damage dealt.
description.to: Deals M.DMG equal to {0}% of ATK to nearby enemies and reduces their ATK by {1}% every sec. Additionally, increases DMG dealt against Non-Hero enemies of the ally with the highest ATK excluding self by {2}%. The DMG Boost effect is irremovable. When the Passive Skill is activated, recovers 30% of Mana.

description.from: Summons the soul of Unchanging Mind, Erekura for 10sec, increasing own Heal Rate by 27%. Every 0.5sec, reduces M.DEF of all enemies by 3% for 5sec. This effect stacks up to 5 times. After 10sec, consumes stacks on the target to deal 160% of ATK M.DMG per stack.
description.to: Summons the soul of Unchanging Mind, Erekura for 10 sec, increasing Heal Rate of self by 50%. Every 0.5 sec, increases M.DMG all enemies take by 10% for 5 sec. This effect stacks up to 5 times. After 10 sec, consumes the stacks from the target to deal M.DMG per stack (x2 than usual).

2.from: Changes M.DEF reduction per stack to 20%.
2.to: Changes M.DMG Boost per stack to 20%.
